title: chore(deps): update dependency setuptools to ~=67.8.0

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>pypa/setuptools</summary>

### [`v67.8.0`](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/blob/HEAD/CHANGES.rst#v6780)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/compare/v67.7.2...v67.8.0)

Changes
^^^^^^^

-   [#​3128](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3128): In deprecated easy_install, reload and merge the pth file before saving.

Misc
^^^^

-   [#​3915](https://togithub.com/pypa/setuptools/issues/3915): Adequate tests to the latest changes in `virtualenv` for Python 3.12.

</details>
